name: dual-agent-vscode
description: VS Code extension for deterministic dual-agent code generation and review workflows.

commands.title: Dual Agent: Repair Legacy Command Templates

dualAgent.workflow.autoRun.description: Automatically continue through stages until the workflow completes or fails.

dualAgent.workflow.maxIterations.description: Maximum number of workflow review cycles before stopping.

dualAgent.workflow.stages.description: Ordered stage definitions for the dual-agent workflow.

dualAgent.workflow.files.agentAOutput.description: Agent A generation output file name.

dualAgent.workflow.files.agentBOutput.description: Agent B generation output file name.

dualAgent.agentA.executable.description: Executable used to launch Agent A in interactive mode.

dualAgent.agentA.args.description: Arguments used to launch Agent A in interactive mode.

dualAgent.agentA.commandTemplate.description: Legacy one-shot command template for Agent A. Kept for migration compatibility.

dualAgent.agentA.generatePrompt.default:
You are Claude in generator mode.

- Read {{taskFile}} and {{stateFile}}.
- If {{reviewFile}} contains issues, apply all requested fixes directly in the workspace.
- Do not review. Modify the real project files in {{workspaceFolder}}.
- When finished, write JSON to {{outputFile}} using this shape:
{ "type": "code_generation", "author": "agent_a", "changedFiles": ["relative/path"], "summary": "...", "notes": "optional" }
dualAgent.agentA.generatePrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent A generate stages.

dualAgent.agentA.reviewPrompt.default:
You are Claude in reviewer mode.

- Read the latest workspace changes and the other agent output artifacts.
- Review Codex output strictly.
- Do not generate code.
- Write review JSON to {{outputFile}} using this shape:
{ "type": "review", "reviewer": "agent_a", "target": "agent_b", "issues": [{ "severity": "high", "file": "path", "problem": "...", "fix": "..." }], "summary": "Approved or Needs fixes" }
dualAgent.agentA.reviewPrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent A review stages.

dualAgent.agentB.executable.description: Executable used to launch Agent B in interactive mode.

dualAgent.agentB.args.description: Arguments used to launch Agent B in interactive mode.

dualAgent.agentB.commandTemplate.description: Legacy one-shot command template for Agent B. Kept for migration compatibility.

dualAgent.agentB.generatePrompt.default:
You are Codex in generator mode.

- Read {{taskFile}}, {{reviewFile}}, and {{stateFile}}.
- Apply all fixes directly in the workspace at {{workspaceFolder}}.
- Do not review.
- When finished, write JSON to {{outputFile}} using this shape:
{ "type": "code_generation", "author": "agent_b", "changedFiles": ["relative/path"], "summary": "...", "notes": "optional" }
dualAgent.agentB.generatePrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent B generate stages.

dualAgent.agentB.reviewPrompt.default:
You are Codex in reviewer mode.

- Read the latest workspace changes and Claude output artifacts.
- Output structured review issues only.
- Do not generate code.
- Write review JSON to {{outputFile}} using this shape:
{ "type": "review", "reviewer": "agent_b", "target": "agent_a", "issues": [{ "severity": "high", "file": "path", "problem": "...", "fix": "..." }], "summary": "Approved or Needs fixes" }
dualAgent.agentB.reviewPrompt.description: Prompt template for Agent B review stages.

dualAgent.runtime.invalidOutputRetries.description: How many invalid output writes are tolerated before failing the stage.

dualAgent.runtime.watchDebounceMs.description: Debounce for file watcher stage completion handling.
